creator: w.litter@aon.at
text:
portlint says:
WARN: Makefile: Consider defining LICENSE.
WARN: /usr/ports/biology/platon/files/patch-warnings: patch was not generated using ``make makepatch''.  It is recommended to use ``make makepatch'' when you need to [re-]generate a patch to ensure proper patch format.
0 fatal errors and 2 warnings found.


But make makepatch is without effect.
